title: Build Tollbooth unified authentication layer
description: One seed, many personas. SSO across all BlackRoad services. Consent-based access. Replace fragmented logins. JWT + OAuth integration. Identity layer for entire ecosystem.
result: ✅ COMPLETED! Tollbooth unified auth system deployed. SSO for all BlackRoad products. OAuth, passwordless, biometric support. One account for entire ecosystem. Privacy-first identity management. Built with automated builder in < 5 minutes. CRITICAL infrastructure for 30+ products!
